title: Buttery, Crisp, Indulgent Greek Chestnut Mushroom Gratin
description: A rich and satisfying keto-friendly side dish featuring caramelized chestnut mushrooms, crispy parmesan crust, and a creamy butter sauce.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the sliced mushrooms and cook, stirring occasionally, until browned and caramelized (about 8-10 minutes).
Add the garlic, thyme, oregano, salt, and pepper to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Transfer the mushroom mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish. Dot the top with the unsalted butter.
In a small bowl, mix together the Grana Padano cheese and Parmesan cheese. Sprinkle the cheese mixture evenly over the mushrooms.
Bake the gratin for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the gratin from the oven and stir in the Greek yogurt. Sprinkle the top with chopped parsley.
Return the gratin to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly.
Remove the gratin from the oven and let it cool for 5-10 minutes before serving.
